summary: Good-quality recording of the famed Feb 14 1968 second set, highlighted by a red‑hot run of The Other One, New Potato Caboose and other classic jams.
review: Both reviewers rave about this legendary second set from February 14, 1968, noting its famous eight‑song sequence (The Other One, New Potato Caboose, Born Cross‑Eyed, Spanish Jam, Alligator, Caution (Do Not Stop On Tracks), Feedback, In The Midnight Hour).  While no specific audio comments are given, the high star ratings imply a listenable source, and the show is praised as “red‑hot” and essential for Deadheads.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive feedback on the musical performance (standout eight‑song second set) outweighs the lack of concrete recording quality comments; overall rating reflects a great show with presumed adequate sound.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewers mentioned specific audio characteristics; rating based on implied listenability from high star scores.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is the famed eight‑song sequence that defines this show; reviewers consider it a high‑energy, cohesive half of the concert.
